# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- LuSplit UI should use UX terminology instead of domain vocabulary (Trip/Event/Split rule/Payment/Person/Who owes who), keep V1 to three tabs (Trips, Activity, Balances), prioritize trip timeline and Add Event flow, and avoid accounting-first UX.
- LuSplit UX should feel instant and local-first: no loading spinners, sync indicators, or connectivity state; favor smart defaults and human-readable timeline entries with contextual icons.
